_meta.label: NEEDS REVIEW - Service quote covering 4 distinct service lines; all fields present; routed to human review
_meta.test_focus: multi-scope service_quote: on-site maintenance, inspection, parts supply, emergency response

inbound_message.subject: Annual Maintenance Contract RFQ - Multi-Scope
inbound_message.body:
Hi,

We are seeking quotes for our annual site maintenance contract, covering the following scope:

1. On-site planned maintenance visits (monthly, 12 visits per year)
2. Scheduled safety inspection (quarterly, 4 visits per year)
3. Parts supply allowance (estimated 20 line items across the year)
4. Emergency response callout (up to 40 hours on-call coverage)

Contract start date: 1 September 2025.

Oliver Kane
Ashfield Plant Services Ltd

line_items.raw_text: Parts supply allowance, estimated 20 line items

routing_reasons: classify: request_type=service_quote - catalog match skipped, routed to human review
